creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #4)
Not on Transmission side: consumers have to explicitly call OSSL_PROVIDER_load(NULL, "legacy") or similar to enable deprecated ciphers. Anyway, obsolete after ports 8da970ab75e1 due to upstream fix.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 269504 ***
